title: geranium haussknechtii
intro: Geranium haussknechtii, also known as the Iranian geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is used medicinally for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation in the body. The plant is rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, providing several health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Geranium haussknechtii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression.
